steps.upload_desc: Add a podcast, text, or video. The platform will transcribe and prepare the content for extraction.

admin.subtitle: Monitoring and control for the AI-IDEI platform

jobs.title: Execution History
jobs.guide_desc: Jobs are AI tasks that run in the background. Each service you use (neuron extraction, content generation, analysis, etc.) creates one or more jobs.
jobs.status_pending_desc: Job is queued and will be processed automatically. Average wait: 5-30 seconds.
jobs.status_running_desc: AI is actively processing this job. Duration depends on task complexity (30s – 5min).
jobs.status_completed_desc: Job finished successfully. Results are available. Click to view.
jobs.status_failed_desc: Job failed. System retries automatically up to 3 times. Contact support if persistent.
jobs.no_jobs_hint: Run a service to create your first job.
jobs.no_filter_results: No results for the selected filter
jobs.retries_exhausted: All retries exhausted. Check input and retry manually.

data_privacy.title: Data & Privacy
data_privacy.description: You have full control over your data. Export everything we store about you, or permanently delete your account and all associated data.
data_privacy.export_desc: Download a JSON file containing all your data: profile, neurons, episodes, artifacts, credits, feedback, and more. This file is portable and can be imported into other systems.
data_privacy.delete_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data including neurons, episodes, artifacts, credits, and feedback. This action is irreversible.
data_privacy.delete_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_text: By accessing or using the AI-IDEI Knowledge OS platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.s2_text: AI-IDEI is an AI-powered knowledge extraction and capitalization platform. It transforms raw content (audio, video, text) into structured knowledge units called "neurons" and generates reusable digital assets ("artifacts").
terms.s3_text: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities under your account.
terms.s4_text: You retain full ownership of all content you upload ("User Content"). By uploading, you grant AI-IDEI a limited license to process your content for the purpose of delivering the Service. We do not sell, share, or publicly expose your private content without your explicit consent.
terms.s5_text: The platform uses a credit-based system called NEURONS to meter AI service consumption. Credits are non-refundable once consumed. Unused credits remain in your account indefinitely unless otherwise stated.
terms.s6_item1: Upload illegal, harmful, or infringing content
terms.s6_item2: Attempt to reverse-engineer, exploit, or disrupt the Service
terms.s6_item3: Use automated systems to scrape or extract data beyond intended use
terms.s6_item4: Violate the intellectual property rights of others
terms.s7_text: Outputs generated by AI services are provided "as-is." While we strive for accuracy, AI-generated content may contain errors. You are responsible for reviewing and validating all outputs before use.
terms.s8_text: AI-IDEI is provided "as-is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.
terms.s9_text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time by contacting support.
terms.s10_text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.s11_text: For questions about these Terms, please use the

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_intro: We collect information you provide directly:
privacy.s1_account: Account data: email address, display name, avatar
privacy.s1_content: Content: transcripts, audio files, text you upload for processing
privacy.s1_usage: Usage data: service runs, credit transactions, feature interactions
privacy.s1_auto: We also collect technical data automatically: IP address, browser type, device information, and page visit timestamps.
privacy.s2_item1: To provide and improve the Service
privacy.s2_item2: To process your content through AI pipelines
privacy.s2_item3: To manage your account and credit balance
privacy.s3_text: Your uploaded content is processed by AI models to extract knowledge units. This processing happens on secure infrastructure. We do not use your private content to train our models without your explicit consent.
privacy.s4_text: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. We use Row Level Security (RLS) to ensure users can only access their own data. Authentication is handled via secure JWT tokens.
privacy.s5_intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with:
privacy.s5_item1: AI providers: to process your content (e.g., transcription, extraction)
privacy.s5_item2: Payment processors: to handle credit top-ups
privacy.s5_item3: Law enforcement: when required by law
privacy.s6_intro: If you are in the EU/EEA, you have the right to:
privacy.s6_item4: Export your data in a portable format
privacy.s6_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us via the
privacy.s7_text: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use third-party advertising cookies. Analytics cookies (if enabled) are used to understand platform usage patterns.
privacy.s8_text: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, we remove your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.
privacy.s9_text: The Service is not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from children.
privacy.s10_text: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification.

pipeline_overview.title: Knowledge Pipeline
pipeline_overview.subtitle: One upload → 6 stages → 50+ deliverables. The complete flow from raw content to structured knowledge assets.
pipeline_overview.source_desc: Ingest raw content: YouTube, audio, video, PDF, text, URLs. Automatic format detection and metadata extraction.
pipeline_overview.transcribe_desc: AI transcription with speaker diarization and language detection. Supports 50+ languages.
pipeline_overview.segment_desc: Semantic chunking into 300-800 token blocks with context overlap for precise extraction.
pipeline_overview.extract_desc: Multi-axis AI extraction: insights, frameworks, patterns, psychological signals, JTBD patterns across 9 specialized prompts.
pipeline_overview.link_desc: Build knowledge graph: connect neurons, compute IdeaRank scores, cluster topics, detect patterns.
pipeline_overview.generate_desc: Produce 50+ deliverable types: articles, courses, frameworks, scripts, social posts, reports.
